title: Pronunciation Coach
description: 11 rounds of speaking practice - echo, pauses, word stress, speed, minimal pairs, voice clarity, intonation, a 1-minute topic speech and a filler-word detector - with a live Pronunciation / Clarity / Fluency / Accuracy scorecard.

title: Word Builder
description: Arrange scrambled words into a correct sentence - practice sentence formation, grammar and word order. 493 sentences.

title: Verb Challenge
description: See a verb, pick the correct V2 (past) or V3 (past participle) form from the other forms. Covers all 50 verbs in the Verb Mastery Bank.

title: Fill in the Blank
description: A sentence is missing a word - pick the correct verb form to complete it. 475 sentences from the Verb Mastery Bank.

title: Find the Mistake
description: A sentence has one or more wrong words - tap the mistake, check your answer, and see the correction explained. Pulled from 888 real common mistakes.
